channel.title: SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSportsAndEntertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: From Skinny Jeans to Bling: 2010s Trends Take Over NYFW

item.description: Dave Franco is hopping into a big celebration. After all, he and wife Alison Brie are getting ready to celebrate their ninth wedding anniversary. And ...

item.title: Martin Short's Daughter Katherine Died By Suicide
item.description: Martin Short's daughter, Katherine, has taken her own life ... TMZ has learned. The 42-year-old died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound ... law enfor...

item.title: 'Baylen Out Loud' Star Baylen Dupree Defends John Davidson's BAFTAs Outburst

item.title: Dimitrius Graham Says Fractured Wrist From Arrest Cost Him $10K in Gigs

item.title: An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
